messages.content: Classification mode: Output exactly the requested label and nothing else. No preface, explanations, emojis, or sign-offs.
Classify the following short review as "positive", "neutral", or "negative" only: "The interface is clunky, but it gets the job done once you learn it."
Now classify this one and output only the single label without punctuation, advice, or closing remarks: "Support was slow at first, then they solved everything quickly"
